a:T6441,<div class="specification">
<p>Lactose, found in milk and dairy products, is a disaccharide formed from two different monosaccharides. The structure of lactose is shown with numbered carbon atoms.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Name the type of link between the two monosaccharide residues.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Outline how the two monomer structures, galactose and glucose, differ.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/chemistry/topic/b/","children":["← back to ","Chemistry"," topic ","b"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18N.3.SL.TZ0.8"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Chemistry"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","b-4-carbohydrates"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>«1,4-»glycosidic ✔</p>\n<p> </p>\n<p><em>Do <strong>not</strong> accept “glucosidic”.</em></p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>H and OH are reversed/in different positions on C-4 ✔</p>\n<p> </p>\n<p><em>C-4 must be specified.</em></p>\n<p><em>Do <strong>not</strong> penalize if reference is made to H and OH above and below ring/in alpha and beta positions on C-4 incorrectly.</em></p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
